Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class ProcessModelThroughputResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.ProcessModelThroughputResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProcessModelThroughputResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result object for a full process-model throughput-to-bottleneck study.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ProcessModelThroughputResult

      public ProcessModelThroughputResult(String studyName, String objectiveName, String objectiveUnit)
      Creates a throughput result.
      Parameters:
      studyName - study name
      objectiveName - objective name
      objectiveUnit - objective unit

  • Method Details

    • addCase

      public void addCase(ThroughputCaseRow row)
      Adds an evaluated case row.
      Parameters:
      row - evaluated case row

    • getStudyName

      public String getStudyName()
      Gets the study name.
      Returns:
      study name

    • setStudyName

      public void setStudyName(String studyName)
      Sets the study name.
      Parameters:
      studyName - study name

    • getObjectiveName

      public String getObjectiveName()
      Gets the objective name.
      Returns:
      objective name

    • setObjectiveName

      public void setObjectiveName(String objectiveName)
      Sets the objective name.
      Parameters:
      objectiveName - objective name

    • getObjectiveUnit

      public String getObjectiveUnit()
      Gets the objective unit.
      Returns:
      objective unit

    • setObjectiveUnit

      public void setObjectiveUnit(String objectiveUnit)
      Sets the objective unit.
      Parameters:
      objectiveUnit - objective unit

    • getCaseRows

      public List<ThroughputCaseRow> getCaseRows()
      Gets evaluated case rows.
      Returns:
      immutable list of case rows

    • getBestFeasibleCase

      public ThroughputCaseRow getBestFeasibleCase()
      Gets the best feasible case.
      Returns:
      best feasible case, or null when none was found

    • getFirstInfeasibleCase

      public ThroughputCaseRow getFirstInfeasibleCase()
      Gets the first infeasible case.
      Returns:
      first infeasible case, or null when all evaluated cases were feasible

    • getOptimalMultiplier

      public double getOptimalMultiplier()
      Gets the optimal throughput multiplier.
      Returns:
      best feasible multiplier, or NaN when no feasible case was found

    • getOptimalObjectiveValue

      public double getOptimalObjectiveValue()
      Gets the optimal objective value.
      Returns:
      objective value at the best feasible case, or NaN when none exists

    • isLowerBoundFeasible

      public boolean isLowerBoundFeasible()
      Checks whether the lower bound was feasible.
      Returns:
      true when the lower bound case was feasible

    • setLowerBoundFeasible

      public void setLowerBoundFeasible(boolean lowerBoundFeasible)
      Sets lower-bound feasibility.
      Parameters:
      lowerBoundFeasible - true when the lower bound case was feasible

    • isUpperBoundFeasible

      public boolean isUpperBoundFeasible()
      Checks whether the upper bound was feasible.
      Returns:
      true when the upper bound case was feasible

    • setUpperBoundFeasible

      public void setUpperBoundFeasible(boolean upperBoundFeasible)
      Sets upper-bound feasibility.
      Parameters:
      upperBoundFeasible - true when the upper bound case was feasible

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts the result to a JSON-friendly map.
      Returns:
      result map

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the result as JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON result string

    • exportToCSV

      public void exportToCSV(String filePath) throws IOException
      Exports the case table to CSV.
      Parameters:
      filePath - output file path
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails

    • exportToCSV

      public void exportToCSV(Path filePath) throws IOException
      Exports the case table to CSV.
      Parameters:
      filePath - output file path
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails

      private String csvEscape(String value)
      Escapes a value for CSV output.

      Returns:
      escaped CSV value
